## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request, including any new components, backend routes, schema changes, or UI updates.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification & Testing
Describe the verification steps performed to validate these changes.
- [ ] Backend Unit Tests run successfully (`pytest` / `python manage.py test`)
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Manual verification screenshots or screen recordings attached

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows coding style standards (PEP 8 for Python, ESLint for TypeScript)
- [ ] Clean migrations generated for any schema changes
- [ ] No hardcoded configuration values or credentials
- [ ] Documentation updated accordingly
